case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE EFRAIN XITUMUL

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-09-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEDEVO LEGAL COLLETION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSE EFRAIN XITUMUL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XITUMUL, JOSE EFRAIN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
